repository.name: competitive-kpi-tool
repository.description: Local-first desktop KPI tracker for competitive programming practice, built with Lazarus, Object Pascal, and SQLite.

project.title: Competitive KPI Tool — Roadmap
project.short_description: 24-week roadmap from empty repository to a tested local-first Lazarus desktop release.
project.readme: Source of truth: automation-package/planning/project.json. The roadmap covers architecture, SQLite, KPI calculations, export, testing, security, CI, documentation, and v1.0 release preparation.

milestones.title: v0.1 Foundation
milestones.description: Repository, requirements, architecture, and runnable desktop skeleton.

milestones.title: v0.2 Data Layer
milestones.description: SQLite schema, transactions, session repository, and settings.

milestones.title: v0.3 Core KPI
milestones.description: KPI calculations, dashboard, streaks, and validated session entry.

milestones.title: v0.4 UX and Integrations
milestones.description: History management, CSV/SQL export, and reminders.

milestones.title: v0.5 Quality
milestones.description: Automated tests, CI, security hardening, and performance evidence.

milestones.title: v1.0 Release
milestones.description: Documentation, examples, cross-platform packaging, and release review.

issues.title: Define product requirements and KPI semantics
issues.objective: Define the exact behavior of goals, streaks, completion rates, and practice sessions.
issues.context: The repository has no implementation. Stable definitions prevent later database and UI rework.
tasks: Document user personas and primary workflows
Define daily goal, weekly average, streak, and completion formulas
acceptance: Every KPI has an unambiguous formula
Edge cases for zero activity and missed days are documented
risks: Definitions may not reflect real practice habits
issues.body:
## Objective
Define the exact behavior of goals, streaks, completion rates, and practice sessions.

## Context
The repository has no implementation. Stable definitions prevent later database and UI rework.

## Tasks
- [ ] Document user personas and primary workflows
- [ ] Define daily goal, weekly average, streak, and completion formulas
- [ ] Record assumptions and edge cases

## Acceptance criteria
- [ ] Every KPI has an unambiguous formula
- [ ] Edge cases for zero activity and missed days are documented
- [ ] Scope and non-goals are approved

## Files affected
- `docs/product-requirements.md`
- `docs/kpi-specification.md`

## Dependencies
None

## Risks
- Definitions may not reflect real practice habits

## Tests
- Peer review against sample data

## Documentation
- Update README scope

## Planning
- Estimate: 4 hours
- Priority: P0
- Complexity: S
- Risk: Low
- Start date: 2026-07-20
- Target date: 2026-07-26
- Milestone: v0.1 Foundation

issues.title: Create repository standards and contribution policy
issues.objective: Establish maintainable repository conventions for code, documentation, commits, and releases.
issues.context: The project is intended for education, portfolio review, and future contributors.
tasks: Add license, editor settings, and ignore rules
acceptance: Generated files and local databases are ignored
A contributor can understand the workflow
risks: Overly complex process for a small project
tests: Validate line endings and ignore rules
issues.body:
## Objective
Establish maintainable repository conventions for code, documentation, commits, and releases.

## Context
The project is intended for education, portfolio review, and future contributors.

## Tasks
- [ ] Add license, editor settings, and ignore rules
- [ ] Define branch and commit conventions
- [ ] Create contribution and code-of-conduct documents

## Acceptance criteria
- [ ] Repository metadata is complete
- [ ] Generated files and local databases are ignored
- [ ] A contributor can understand the workflow

## Files affected
- `LICENSE`
- `.gitignore`
- `.editorconfig`
- `CONTRIBUTING.md`
- `CODE_OF_CONDUCT.md`

## Dependencies
CKT-001

## Risks
- Overly complex process for a small project

## Tests
- Validate line endings and ignore rules

## Documentation
- Document development workflow

## Planning
- Estimate: 4 hours
- Priority: P0
- Complexity: S
- Risk: Low
- Start date: 2026-07-27
- Target date: 2026-08-02
- Milestone: v0.1 Foundation

issues.title: Design layered application architecture
issues.objective: Define clear UI, service, domain, and data boundaries for the Lazarus application.
issues.context: A layered design keeps SQLite, exports, and future integrations replaceable.
acceptance: Domain calculations can be tested independently
risks: Architecture may be too ambitious for owner level
issues.body:
## Objective
Define clear UI, service, domain, and data boundaries for the Lazarus application.

## Context
A layered design keeps SQLite, exports, and future integrations replaceable.

## Tasks
- [ ] Define modules and dependency direction
- [ ] Document public and private interfaces
- [ ] Define error and logging strategy

## Acceptance criteria
- [ ] UI does not contain SQL
- [ ] Domain calculations can be tested independently
- [ ] Architecture decision records capture trade-offs

## Files affected
- `docs/architecture.md`
- `docs/adr/0001-layered-architecture.md`

## Dependencies
CKT-001

## Risks
- Architecture may be too ambitious for owner level

## Tests
- Review dependency graph

## Documentation
- Create architecture diagram

## Planning
- Estimate: 4 hours
- Priority: P0
- Complexity: M
- Risk: Medium
- Start date: 2026-08-03
- Target date: 2026-08-09
- Milestone: v0.1 Foundation

issues.title: Create Lazarus desktop application skeleton
issues.objective: Create a cross-platform Lazarus application that opens and displays the main dashboard.
issues.context: The starter must run locally on desktop systems without network access.
acceptance: Main form starts without external services
risks: LCL widget differences across platforms
issues.body:
## Objective
Create a cross-platform Lazarus application that opens and displays the main dashboard.

## Context
The starter must run locally on desktop systems without network access.

## Tasks
- [ ] Create .lpr and Lazarus project metadata
- [ ] Add programmatic main form
- [ ] Add application data directory helper

## Acceptance criteria
- [ ] Project opens in Lazarus
- [ ] Main form starts without external services
- [ ] Application data path is platform-safe

## Files affected
- `src/competitive_kpi_tool.lpr`
- `src/competitive_kpi_tool.lpi`
- `src/ui/main_form.pas`
- `src/core/app_paths.pas`

## Dependencies
CKT-003

## Risks
- LCL widget differences across platforms

## Tests
- Build on Linux
- Manual startup smoke test

## Documentation
- Add build instructions

## Planning
- Estimate: 4 hours
- Priority: P0
- Complexity: M
- Risk: Medium
- Start date: 2026-08-10
- Target date: 2026-08-16
- Milestone: v0.1 Foundation

issues.title: Define SQLite schema and migration strategy
issues.objective: Design a normalized local schema for settings and practice sessions.
issues.context: The database is the source of truth and must support reliable export and future evolution.
risks: Schema changes can make old data unreadable
issues.body:
## Objective
Design a normalized local schema for settings and practice sessions.

## Context
The database is the source of truth and must support reliable export and future evolution.

## Tasks
- [ ] Define tables, constraints, and indexes
- [ ] Add schema version table
- [ ] Document migration transaction rules

## Acceptance criteria
- [ ] Schema prevents invalid negative values
- [ ] Dates use ISO-8601
- [ ] Migrations are repeatable and transactional

## Files affected
- `src/data/kpi_database.pas`
- `docs/database-schema.md`

## Dependencies
CKT-003

## Risks
- Schema changes can make old data unreadable

## Tests
- Create fresh database
- Reopen existing database

## Documentation
- Add ER diagram

## Planning
- Estimate: 4 hours
- Priority: P0
- Complexity: M
- Risk: Medium
- Start date: 2026-08-17
- Target date: 2026-08-23
- Milestone: v0.2 Data Layer

issues.title: Implement SQLite connection and initialization
issues.objective: Implement safe database creation, connection lifecycle, transactions, and schema initialization.
issues.context: Local-first reliability depends on correct transaction and resource handling.
acceptance: Database is created on first run
risks: SQLite package availability differs by installation
issues.body:
## Objective
Implement safe database creation, connection lifecycle, transactions, and schema initialization.

## Context
Local-first reliability depends on correct transaction and resource handling.

## Tasks
- [ ] Create connection wrapper
- [ ] Initialize schema in a transaction
- [ ] Return clear error messages

## Acceptance criteria
- [ ] Database is created on first run
- [ ] Repeated initialization is idempotent
- [ ] Connections and queries are freed

## Files affected
- `src/data/kpi_database.pas`

## Dependencies
CKT-005, CKT-004

## Risks
- SQLite package availability differs by installation

## Tests
- Fresh database test
- Repeated startup test
- Invalid path test

## Documentation
- Document Lazarus SQLite package requirements

## Planning
- Estimate: 4 hours
- Priority: P0
- Complexity: M
- Risk: Medium
- Start date: 2026-08-24
- Target date: 2026-08-30
- Milestone: v0.2 Data Layer

issues.title: Implement practice session repository operations
issues.objective: Add create, read, update, and delete operations for practice sessions.
issues.context: Session records are the basis of every KPI and export.
acceptance: No SQL is built from user-controlled strings
risks: Incorrect date conversion can affect KPI results
issues.body:
## Objective
Add create, read, update, and delete operations for practice sessions.

## Context
Session records are the basis of every KPI and export.

## Tasks
- [ ] Insert validated sessions
- [ ] List recent sessions
- [ ] Add update and delete methods
- [ ] Use parameterized SQL

## Acceptance criteria
- [ ] No SQL is built from user-controlled strings
- [ ] CRUD operations preserve data integrity
- [ ] Recent sessions are ordered deterministically

## Files affected
- `src/data/kpi_database.pas`
- `src/core/kpi_types.pas`

## Dependencies
CKT-006

## Risks
- Incorrect date conversion can affect KPI results

## Tests
- CRUD integration tests
- Special-character notes test

## Documentation
- Document data model

## Planning
- Estimate: 4 hours
- Priority: P0
- Complexity: M
- Risk: Medium
- Start date: 2026-08-31
- Target date: 2026-09-06
- Milestone: v0.2 Data Layer

issues.title: Add settings persistence and configurable daily goal
issues.objective: Persist the user's daily problem goal and reminder preference.
issues.context: A configurable goal is required for meaningful completion metrics.
risks: Too many settings can complicate the first release
documentation: Add settings section to user guide
issues.body:
## Objective
Persist the user's daily problem goal and reminder preference.

## Context
A configurable goal is required for meaningful completion metrics.

## Tasks
- [ ] Create settings record
- [ ] Load defaults on first run
- [ ] Validate goal range
- [ ] Add settings UI

## Acceptance criteria
- [ ] Goal persists across restarts
- [ ] Invalid values cannot be saved
- [ ] Default goal is documented

## Files affected
- `src/data/kpi_database.pas`
- `src/ui/settings_form.pas`

## Dependencies
CKT-006

## Risks
- Too many settings can complicate the first release

## Tests

- Persistence test

## Documentation
- Add settings section to user guide

- Estimate: 4 hours
- Priority: P1
- Complexity: S
- Risk: Low
- Start date: 2026-09-07
- Target date: 2026-09-13
- Milestone: v0.2 Data Layer

issues.title: Implement KPI calculation library
issues.objective: Implement pure functions for completion rate, average solved problems, and trend calculations.
issues.context: Pure functions are easier to verify than calculations embedded in SQL or UI code.
acceptance: Functions have no UI or database dependency
risks: Rounding rules can create misleading displays
issues.body:
## Objective
Implement pure functions for completion rate, average solved problems, and trend calculations.

## Context
Pure functions are easier to verify than calculations embedded in SQL or UI code.

## Tasks
- [ ] Implement completion percentage
- [ ] Implement rolling averages
- [ ] Define rounding behavior
- [ ] Handle empty samples

## Acceptance criteria
- [ ] Functions have no UI or database dependency
- [ ] Division-by-zero is handled
- [ ] Results match specification examples

## Files affected
- `src/core/kpi_calculator.pas`
- `tests/test_kpi_calculator.pas`

## Dependencies
CKT-001, CKT-003

## Risks
- Rounding rules can create misleading displays

## Tests
- Boundary-value unit tests
- Known sample tests

## Documentation
- Document formulas

## Planning
- Estimate: 4 hours
- Priority: P0
- Complexity: M
- Risk: Medium
- Start date: 2026-09-14
- Target date: 2026-09-20
- Milestone: v0.3 Core KPI

issues.title: Implement current streak calculation
issues.objective: Calculate the current consecutive practice-day streak using local dates.
issues.context: Streak logic must be explicit about an incomplete current day and local time boundaries.
tasks: Allow today to remain incomplete until day end
acceptance: Yesterday-based active streak is preserved when today is incomplete
A missed full day ends the streak
Tests cover month and year boundaries
risks: Timezone interpretation can surprise users
issues.body:
## Objective
Calculate the current consecutive practice-day streak using local dates.

## Context
Streak logic must be explicit about an incomplete current day and local time boundaries.

## Tasks
- [ ] Implement streak query
- [ ] Allow today to remain incomplete until day end
- [ ] Add deterministic date tests

## Acceptance criteria
- [ ] Yesterday-based active streak is preserved when today is incomplete
- [ ] A missed full day ends the streak
- [ ] Tests cover month and year boundaries

## Files affected
- `src/data/kpi_database.pas`
- `tests/test_streaks.pas`

## Dependencies
CKT-007, CKT-009

## Risks
- Timezone interpretation can surprise users

## Tests
- Month-boundary test
- Leap-year test
- No-session test

## Documentation
- Explain streak semantics

## Planning
- Estimate: 4 hours
- Priority: P0
- Complexity: M
- Risk: Medium
- Start date: 2026-09-21
- Target date: 2026-09-27
- Milestone: v0.3 Core KPI

issues.title: Build dashboard KPI summary
issues.objective: Display today's progress, seven-day average, total sessions, and current streak.
issues.context: The dashboard is the primary feedback loop for daily practice.
acceptance: Empty database has useful zero state
risks: Dense UI may reduce clarity
issues.body:
## Objective
Display today's progress, seven-day average, total sessions, and current streak.

## Context
The dashboard is the primary feedback loop for daily practice.

## Tasks
- [ ] Create KPI cards
- [ ] Refresh after data changes
- [ ] Show goal completion clearly
- [ ] Handle database errors without crashing

## Acceptance criteria
- [ ] Dashboard updates immediately after save
- [ ] Empty database has useful zero state
- [ ] All values include units

## Files affected
- `src/ui/main_form.pas`
- `src/core/kpi_calculator.pas`

## Dependencies
CKT-009, CKT-010

## Risks
- Dense UI may reduce clarity

## Tests
- Manual empty-state test
- Save-and-refresh test

## Documentation
- Add dashboard screenshot placeholder

## Planning
- Estimate: 4 hours
- Priority: P0
- Complexity: M
- Risk: Medium
- Start date: 2026-09-28
- Target date: 2026-10-04
- Milestone: v0.3 Core KPI

issues.title: Implement session entry and validation workflow
issues.objective: Allow users to record date, platform, solved problems, practice minutes, and notes.
issues.context: Fast, safe data entry is essential for consistent usage.
tasks: Validate ISO date and numeric ranges
acceptance: Invalid values never reach the database
Successful save refreshes dashboard and history
risks: Manual date entry can cause formatting errors
issues.body:
## Objective
Allow users to record date, platform, solved problems, practice minutes, and notes.

## Context
Fast, safe data entry is essential for consistent usage.

## Tasks
- [ ] Create form controls
- [ ] Validate ISO date and numeric ranges
- [ ] Provide actionable validation messages
- [ ] Reset inputs after save

## Acceptance criteria
- [ ] Invalid values never reach the database
- [ ] Keyboard-only entry is possible
- [ ] Successful save refreshes dashboard and history

## Files affected
- `src/ui/main_form.pas`
- `src/data/kpi_database.pas`

## Dependencies
CKT-007, CKT-011

## Risks
- Manual date entry can cause formatting errors

## Tests
- Valid entry test
- Invalid date test
- Negative value test

## Documentation
- Document session fields

## Planning
- Estimate: 4 hours
- Priority: P0
- Complexity: M
- Risk: Medium
- Start date: 2026-10-05
- Target date: 2026-10-11
- Milestone: v0.3 Core KPI

issues.title: Add recent activity table and record management
issues.objective: Display recent sessions and support correction or deletion of mistakes.
issues.context: Users need visibility and control over locally stored data.
acceptance: Recent activity is sorted newest first
risks: Accidental deletion can reduce trust
issues.body:
## Objective
Display recent sessions and support correction or deletion of mistakes.

## Context
Users need visibility and control over locally stored data.

## Tasks
- [ ] Populate recent session grid
- [ ] Add selected-record delete action
- [ ] Add edit workflow
- [ ] Confirm destructive operations

## Acceptance criteria
- [ ] Recent activity is sorted newest first
- [ ] Deletion requires confirmation
- [ ] Editing preserves record identity

## Files affected
- `src/ui/main_form.pas`
- `src/ui/session_form.pas`

## Dependencies
CKT-007, CKT-012

## Risks
- Accidental deletion can reduce trust

## Tests
- Edit round-trip test
- Delete confirmation test

## Documentation
- Add record management guide

- Estimate: 4 hours
- Priority: P1
- Complexity: M
- Risk: Medium
- Start date: 2026-10-12
- Target date: 2026-10-18
- Milestone: v0.4 UX and Integrations

issues.title: Implement RFC 4180 compatible CSV export
issues.objective: Export all session data to a spreadsheet-friendly CSV file.
issues.context: CSV demonstrates data portability and enables analysis in Excel or LibreOffice.
tasks: Escape commas, quotes, and line breaks
acceptance: Export does not modify database state
risks: Spreadsheet locale may expect semicolon separators
documentation: Document import settings for Excel and LibreOffice
issues.body:
## Objective
Export all session data to a spreadsheet-friendly CSV file.

## Context
CSV demonstrates data portability and enables analysis in Excel or LibreOffice.

## Tasks
- [ ] Write header row
- [ ] Escape commas, quotes, and line breaks
- [ ] Use UTF-8
- [ ] Export dates in ISO-8601

## Acceptance criteria
- [ ] CSV opens correctly in LibreOffice
- [ ] Quotes and multiline notes round-trip
- [ ] Export does not modify database state

## Files affected
- `src/services/export_service.pas`
- `tests/test_csv_export.pas`

## Dependencies
CKT-007

## Risks
- Spreadsheet locale may expect semicolon separators

## Tests
- Golden-file export test
- Unicode test

## Documentation
- Document import settings for Excel and LibreOffice

## Planning
- Estimate: 4 hours
- Priority: P0
- Complexity: M
- Risk: Medium
- Start date: 2026-10-19
- Target date: 2026-10-25
- Milestone: v0.4 UX and Integrations

issues.title: Implement SQL data export and backup
issues.objective: Export settings and sessions as transaction-safe SQL statements.
issues.context: A readable SQL export demonstrates database competence and provides a recovery path.
acceptance: Export can be imported into an empty compatible database
risks: Malformed escaping could corrupt restores
tests: Import exported SQL into temporary database
issues.body:
## Objective
Export settings and sessions as transaction-safe SQL statements.

## Context
A readable SQL export demonstrates database competence and provides a recovery path.

## Tasks
- [ ] Generate schema-independent INSERT statements
- [ ] Escape SQL strings
- [ ] Wrap export in a transaction
- [ ] Include metadata comments

## Acceptance criteria
- [ ] Export can be imported into an empty compatible database
- [ ] Single quotes are escaped
- [ ] Output is deterministic

## Files affected
- `src/services/export_service.pas`
- `tests/test_sql_export.pas`

## Dependencies
CKT-007

## Risks
- Malformed escaping could corrupt restores

## Tests
- Import exported SQL into temporary database
- Unicode and quote tests

## Documentation
- Add backup and restore guide

## Planning
- Estimate: 4 hours
- Priority: P1
- Complexity: M
- Risk: Medium
- Start date: 2026-10-26
- Target date: 2026-11-01
- Milestone: v0.4 UX and Integrations

issues.title: Add local daily reminder behavior
issues.objective: Remind the user inside the desktop application when the daily goal is incomplete.
issues.context: The first release should remain dependency-light and avoid platform-specific daemons.
tasks: Avoid repeated messages in one session
Define extension point for OS notifications
acceptance: Reminder appears only when enabled and incomplete
risks: In-app reminders require the application to be opened
issues.body:
## Objective
Remind the user inside the desktop application when the daily goal is incomplete.

## Context
The first release should remain dependency-light and avoid platform-specific daemons.

## Tasks
- [ ] Check progress at startup
- [ ] Respect reminder setting
- [ ] Avoid repeated messages in one session
- [ ] Define extension point for OS notifications

## Acceptance criteria
- [ ] Reminder appears only when enabled and incomplete
- [ ] Completed goal suppresses reminder
- [ ] Application remains fully offline

## Files affected
- `src/services/reminder_service.pas`
- `src/ui/main_form.pas`

## Dependencies
CKT-008, CKT-011

## Risks
- In-app reminders require the application to be opened

## Tests
- Enabled/disabled test
- Goal-complete test

## Documentation
- Document reminder limitation

## Planning
- Estimate: 4 hours
- Priority: P1
- Complexity: M
- Risk: Medium
- Start date: 2026-11-02
- Target date: 2026-11-08
- Milestone: v0.4 UX and Integrations

issues.title: Create automated unit test suite
issues.objective: Build repeatable tests for KPI calculations, validation, and export escaping.
issues.context: The portfolio objective requires evidence of correctness, not only working UI behavior.
risks: GUI code remains difficult to test directly
issues.body:
## Objective
Build repeatable tests for KPI calculations, validation, and export escaping.

## Context
The portfolio objective requires evidence of correctness, not only working UI behavior.

## Tasks
- [ ] Configure FPCUnit runner
- [ ] Add KPI tests
- [ ] Add validation tests

- [ ] Failure returns non-zero status

## Risks

- Estimate: 4 hours
- Priority: P0

- Risk: Medium

issues.title: Add CI build and validation workflow
issues.objective: Validate formatting, JSON, tests, and Linux compilation on every change.
issues.context: Continuous integration makes repository quality visible to contributors and recruiters.
acceptance: Workflow runs on push and pull request
risks: Lazarus package names differ between runner images

issues.title: Harden input, database, and file handling
issues.objective: Review attack surface and protect local data from malformed input and unsafe file operations.
issues.context: Although local-first, the application handles user-controlled text and export paths.
tasks: Validate export paths and overwrite confirmation
Set sensible file permissions where supported
acceptance: No user text is concatenated into SQL
Threat model covers local and supply-chain risks
risks: Cross-platform permission behavior is inconsistent
issues.body:
## Objective
Review attack surface and protect local data from malformed input and unsafe file operations.

## Context
Although local-first, the application handles user-controlled text and export paths.

## Tasks
- [ ] Verify all SQL is parameterized
- [ ] Validate export paths and overwrite confirmation
- [ ] Set sensible file permissions where supported
- [ ] Document threat model

## Acceptance criteria
- [ ] No user text is concatenated into SQL
- [ ] Exports require explicit destination
- [ ] Threat model covers local and supply-chain risks

## Files affected
- `docs/security.md`
- `src/data/kpi_database.pas`
- `src/services/export_service.pas`

## Dependencies
CKT-007, CKT-014, CKT-015

## Risks
- Cross-platform permission behavior is inconsistent

## Tests
- Static review
- Malformed-input tests
- Path edge-case tests

## Documentation
- Publish security policy

## Planning
- Estimate: 4 hours
- Priority: P0
- Complexity: M
- Risk: High
- Start date: 2026-11-23
- Target date: 2026-11-29
- Milestone: v0.5 Quality

issues.title: Profile startup and large-history performance
issues.objective: Measure startup, dashboard refresh, and export performance with realistic history sizes.
issues.context: Performance evidence supports scalability claims and prevents unnecessary optimization.
acceptance: Dashboard target is defined and measured
risks: Synthetic data may not represent real usage
issues.body:
## Objective
Measure startup, dashboard refresh, and export performance with realistic history sizes.

## Context
Performance evidence supports scalability claims and prevents unnecessary optimization.

## Tasks
- [ ] Generate benchmark dataset
- [ ] Measure 1k, 10k, and 100k sessions
- [ ] Add relevant indexes
- [ ] Record results and environment

## Acceptance criteria
- [ ] Dashboard target is defined and measured
- [ ] No unbounded UI loading
- [ ] Optimizations are justified by measurements

## Files affected
- `benchmarks/generate_data.pas`
- `docs/performance.md`
- `src/data/kpi_database.pas`

## Dependencies
CKT-011, CKT-014

## Risks
- Synthetic data may not represent real usage

## Tests
- Repeat benchmark three times
- Compare before and after indexes

## Documentation
- Publish benchmark table

## Planning
- Estimate: 4 hours
- Priority: P1
- Complexity: M
- Risk: Medium
- Start date: 2026-11-30
- Target date: 2026-12-06
- Milestone: v0.5 Quality

issues.title: Write complete user and developer documentation
issues.objective: Create installation, usage, architecture, database, export, testing, and troubleshooting documentation.
issues.context: The project targets beginners and recruiters, so operational clarity is part of the product.
acceptance: New user can build and record a session
risks: Documentation can drift from implementation
tests: Follow docs on a clean environment
issues.body:
## Objective
Create installation, usage, architecture, database, export, testing, and troubleshooting documentation.

## Context
The project targets beginners and recruiters, so operational clarity is part of the product.

## Tasks
- [ ] Write user guide
- [ ] Write developer setup
- [ ] Document database and exports
- [ ] Add troubleshooting matrix

## Acceptance criteria
- [ ] New user can build and record a session
- [ ] Developer can run tests
- [ ] Known limitations are explicit

## Files affected
- `README.md`
- `docs/user-guide.md`
- `docs/developer-guide.md`
- `docs/troubleshooting.md`

## Dependencies
CKT-018, CKT-019

## Risks
- Documentation can drift from implementation

## Tests
- Follow docs on a clean environment

## Documentation
- Link every guide from README

## Planning
- Estimate: 4 hours
- Priority: P0
- Complexity: L
- Risk: Low
- Start date: 2026-12-07
- Target date: 2026-12-13
- Milestone: v1.0 Release

issues.body:
## Objective
Produce documented Linux, Windows, and macOS desktop build procedures and checksums.

## Context
Cross-platform support is a core project promise but requires platform-specific validation.

## Tasks

- [ ] Create release packaging scripts
- [ ] Generate checksums
- [ ] Document code-signing limitations

## Acceptance criteria
- [ ] Linux binary is built in CI
- [ ] Windows and macOS procedures are reproducible
- [ ] Artifacts include version and checksum

## Files affected
- `scripts/package-release.sh`
- `.github/workflows/release.yml`
- `docs/releasing.md`

## Dependencies
CKT-018, CKT-021

## Risks
- macOS signing requires Apple credentials
- Cross-compilation may not match native builds

## Tests
- Launch artifact on each supported OS
- Verify clean install

## Documentation
- Publish release checklist

issues.title: Execute v1.0 release readiness review
issues.objective: Run the final quality gate and publish version 1.0.0 when all mandatory criteria pass.
issues.context: A disciplined release demonstrates maintainability, traceability, and professional ownership.
acceptance: No open Critical or High release blockers
risks: Unverified platforms can invalidate release claims
documentation: Publish release notes and known limitations
issues.body:
## Objective
Run the final quality gate and publish version 1.0.0 when all mandatory criteria pass.

## Context
A disciplined release demonstrates maintainability, traceability, and professional ownership.

## Tasks
- [ ] Review all P0 issues
- [ ] Run tests and security checklist
- [ ] Verify documentation and examples
- [ ] Create changelog and release notes
- [ ] Tag v1.0.0

## Acceptance criteria
- [ ] No open Critical or High release blockers
- [ ] CI is green
- [ ] Fresh-install smoke test passes
- [ ] Release notes list limitations

## Files affected
- `CHANGELOG.md`
- `docs/release-checklist.md`
- `README.md`

## Dependencies
CKT-019, CKT-021, CKT-022, CKT-023

## Risks
- Unverified platforms can invalidate release claims

## Tests
- Full regression test
- Fresh database test
- Upgrade-path test

## Documentation
- Publish release notes and known limitations

## Planning
- Estimate: 4 hours
- Priority: P0
- Complexity: M
- Risk: High
- Start date: 2026-12-28
- Target date: 2027-01-03
- Milestone: v1.0 Release
